appInfo.title: About Andmejutt
appInfo.description1: Andmejutt is a text-to-SQL assistant. Ask a question in natural language and your chosen LLM generates a SQL query and answers in natural language with the answer it got.
appInfo.description2: Answers are based on the data your user groups are allowed to access.
appInfo.description3: Review what you can access on the 'Data you can access' page, and adjust your preferences in 'Settings'. You can also contact the administrators under the 'Settings' page if you have any problems using the system.
appInfo.description4: To get the best outcome, ask clear questions and include relevant filters (timeframe, categories, identifiers). If you need specific tables or fields, check first on the 'Data you can access' page, because this helps the LLM generate a query that matches your permissions. When the answer looks off, rephrase the question with more details or narrower constraints. For every topic, create a new chat and it's best to keep chats rather short.

login.description: Enter your email and password to log in.
login.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
login.resetLinkSent: If the email matches an account, a password reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox.
login.resetLinkFailed: Failed to send the reset link.

auth.accountDeactivated: Your account has been deactivated. If this is a mistake, please contact an administrator.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.hint: Enter a new password for your account. After saving, you can log in with the new password.
resetPassword.success: Password updated. You can now log in with the new password.
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 15 characters.

chat.title: Chat
chat.noActiveLlmsContactAdmin: There are no active language models in the system, so chat is unavailable. Please contact an administrator to activate at least one language model.
chat.placeholderNoActiveLlms: Chat is unavailable until an administrator activates a language model.
chat.startNew: Start a new conversation or select an existing one from the left.
chat.writeQuestion: Write a question below to get an answer based on the data in the database.
chat.assistantUnableToGenerate: I was unable to generate a response.
chat.assistantLlmStreamFailed: The selected LLM ran into a temporary problem and stopped responding. Please refresh the page and try again, or choose another LLM.

adminClassifiers.title: Classifiers
adminClassifiers.intro: Manage all system classifiers from one place.

myData.title: Data you can access
myData.intro: Overview of resources granted to your user groups (by database, schema, table, and view).

myData.loadError: Could not load your accessible data structure. Try again later.
myData.noSchemas: This database has no schemas in your access list.
myData.schemaNoTables: This schema has no tables you can access. It may be empty or tables are not registered yet.
myData.schemaNoViews: No views you can access in this schema.

adminChats.title: Chat dashboard
adminChats.searchPlaceholder: Search by chat title or email
adminChats.messagesOverTimeHint: Message counts across the selected timeframe (bucket size adapts to the range).

settings.title: User settings
settings.preferredLlmLanguageDescription: Used as your default language when the model responds.
settings.instructionDescription: Applies to all your conversations. Saving will also update instructions in existing conversations. An empty field removes the instruction.
settings.instructionPlaceholder: E.g. always answer in English and be concise.
settings.changePasswordHint: Update your account password in a separate step.
settings.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 15 characters.
settings.reportSent: Report has been sent to administrators.
settings.reportTooShort: Report must be at least 3 characters.
settings.accessibleDataDescription: See which databases, schemas, and tables your groups can use with the assistant.

classifiers.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate this classifier? It will disappear from active lists.

llmClassifiers.title: LLM-related classifiers
llmClassifiers.intro: Add, edit, or deactivate classifiers used for language models (languages, countries, companies, model groups, modalities, currencies).

dataAccess.title: Data access
dataAccess.noViews: No views registered in this database.
dataAccess.noMaterializedViews: No materialized views registered in this database.
dataAccess.scopeIncomplete: Pick a complete scope to manage access.
dataAccess.resourcesAndGroupsSectionHint: Choose a database and the objects to include, then pick groups and grant or remove access. Current grants for a single selected resource appear on the right.
dataAccess.bulkHint: Select one or more groups and grant or remove access for one or more selected resources.
dataAccess.selectResourcesHint: Choose one database, one or more schemas, tables, and views to grant/remove access in bulk.
dataAccess.searchGroupsPlaceholder: Search by group name or code
dataAccess.markRemoveOnSave: Mark for removal — saved when you click Save. Click again to undo.
dataAccess.currentHint: Shows the groups that currently have access to the selected scope.
dataAccess.selectTargetFirst: Select a database and scope to view grants.
dataAccess.note: Add: database → all schemas, tables, and views under it; schema → all tables and views under it; table or view → that object only. Remove: database → that DB and all schemas/tables/views under it. Schema → that schema, its tables and views, and the database-level grant for that DB (other schemas unchanged). Table or view → that object plus schema- and database-level grants on that lineage if present (sibling objects unchanged).
dataAccess.allGroupsHint: Browse all databases, schemas, tables, and views. Group tiles list access_right rows at that level only (database, schema, table, or view grant).
dataAccess.selectDatabaseTile: Choose a database to view access
dataAccess.byGroupSelectGroup: Choose a group to view access
dataAccess.byGroupNoGroupSelected: Select a group to view access.
dataAccess.byGroupHint: Shows the selected group's access, grouped by database and schema, based on access_right.
dataAccess.treeEditRemoveTitle: Remove group access at this level
dataAccess.treeEditRemoveHint: Only groups with an access_right row on this resource are listed. Use the X button to stage removals, then Save. Cancel or closing the dialog discards staged changes without saving.
dataAccess.treeEditAccessHint: Current section: direct access on this resource — X stages removal. Below: select groups to grant access at this level (backend expands database/schema grants to descendants). Save applies removals first, then grants. Cancel or closing discards unstaged changes.
dataAccess.treeModalAddGroupsHint: Groups that already have a direct grant here are not listed. Selected groups receive access at this resource level only.
dataAccess.treeRemoveWithXHint: Stage removal — Save applies it; Cancel closes without saving. Click again to undo.
dataAccess.treeNoDirectGrants: No direct grants at this level.
dataAccess.treeNoGroupsWithAccess: No groups have access at this level.
dataAccess.accessInheritedOnly: Inherited only — remove the grant at database, schema, or table level.
dataAccess.removeInheritedDisabledHint: This group has no direct grant on this resource.
dataAccess.allGroupsSearchPlaceholder: Search by group name/code or schema/table
dataAccess.adminGroupAccessNotRemovable: The administrator group (ADMIN) always has access to all databases. Select at least one other group to remove access, or remove ADMIN from the selection.
dataAccess.adminGroupAccessProtectedHint: Always has full data access; cannot be removed.
dataAccess.clientSqlHint: Choose a database and groups below. Generates scripts that REVOKE broad privileges and GRANT read-only (SELECT) on that client database for users named like each group, based on access_right.
dataAccess.clientSqlNoDatabase: Select a database in this section.
dataAccess.adminSqlSectionTitle: SQL for administrator read-only database user
dataAccess.adminSqlHint: Generates a read-only SQL script for the dedicated administrator database user used for schema introspection (is_admin connection). This user should have SELECT/read-only permissions and must not be a DB superuser.

apiErrors.INVALID_LLM_OR_LANGUAGE_CODE: Invalid language model ID or language code
apiErrors.PERMISSION_DENIED_API: Permission denied or API data not found
apiErrors.PERMISSION_DENIED_PRICE: Permission denied or price not found
apiErrors.PERMISSION_DENIED_MODALITY: Permission denied or modality not found
apiErrors.PERMISSION_DENIED_LANGUAGE: Permission denied or language not found
apiErrors.INTERNAL_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
apiErrors.LLM_DELETE_NOT_ALLOWED: This model cannot be deleted right now. If the problem persists, try again or contact an administrator.
apiErrors.LLM_DELETE_STILL_ACTIVE: Deactivate this model before deleting it.
apiErrors.LLM_DELETE_NOT_FOUND: This model no longer exists or has already been deleted.
apiErrors.LLM_DELETE_HAS_API: Remove all API keys and endpoints for this model before deleting it.
apiErrors.LLM_DELETE_HAS_PRICING: Remove all pricing records for this model before deleting it.
apiErrors.LLM_DELETE_REFERENCED_BY_MESSAGES: This model cannot be deleted while chat messages still reference it (it was used in conversations).
apiErrors.LLM_NAME_NOT_UNIQUE: Model name must be unique; this name is already in use.
apiErrors.LLM_NAME_FORMAT_INVALID: Model name must contain at least one letter and only allowed characters (letters, numbers, spaces, dot, underscore, hyphen).
apiErrors.LLM_VERSION_FORMAT_INVALID: Version may only contain letters, numbers, dots, slashes, spaces and hyphens.
apiErrors.LLM_CONTEXT_LENGTH_INVALID: Context length must be greater than 0.
apiErrors.LLM_RELEASE_DATE_RANGE_INVALID: Release date must be between 2010-01-01 and 2100-12-31.
apiErrors.LLM_CREATED_AT_RANGE_INVALID: Created time must be between 2025-01-01 and 2101-01-01.
apiErrors.LLM_MODIFIED_AT_RANGE_INVALID: Modified time must be between 2025-01-01 and 2101-01-01.
apiErrors.LLM_CREATED_BEFORE_MODIFIED_INVALID: Created time must be the same as or earlier than modified time.
apiErrors.LLM_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS_INVALID: Maximum output tokens must be greater than 0.
apiErrors.LLM_GROUP_INVALID_OR_FORBIDDEN: The selected model group does not exist or you are not allowed to use it.
apiErrors.LLM_USER_REFERENCE_INVALID: User ID is invalid or missing. Please log in again.
apiErrors.GLOBAL_INSTRUCTION_FIELD_REQUIRED: Field llm_custom_global_instruction is required (string or null).
apiErrors.GLOBAL_INSTRUCTION_INVALID_TYPE: Instruction must be a string or null.
apiErrors.USER_INSTRUCTION_CONTENT_INVALID: Instruction must be empty or contain at least one letter and only allowed characters.
apiErrors.CHANGE_PASSWORD_FIELDS_REQUIRED: Current and new password are required.
apiErrors.NEW_PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: New password must be at least 15 characters.
apiErrors.CURRENT_PASSWORD_WRONG_OR_USER_NOT_FOUND: Current password is wrong or the account was not found.
apiErrors.RESET_TOKEN_INVALID: This password reset link is invalid. Please request a new one.
apiErrors.RESET_TOKEN_EXPIRED: This password reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
apiErrors.RESET_TOKEN_USED: This password reset link has already been used. Please request a new one.
apiErrors.RESET_PASSWORD_FIELDS_REQUIRED: Reset token and new password are required.
apiErrors.REPORT_TOO_SHORT: Message must be at least 3 characters.
apiErrors.REPORT_TABLE_NOT_CONFIGURED: Reporting to admins is not set up (database migration may be missing).
apiErrors.REPORT_CONTENT_INVALID: Message must contain at least one letter and only allowed characters.
apiErrors.LOGIN_USER_ID_INVALID: Invalid user identifier returned from the server.
apiErrors.CHAT_TITLE_ALREADY_EXISTS: You already have a conversation with this title. Please choose a different title.
apiErrors.FORBIDDEN: You are not allowed to perform this action.
apiErrors.INVALID_USED_LLM_ID: Invalid language model ID for the message.
apiErrors.CLASSIFIER_IN_USE: This classifier cannot be changed because it is in use.
apiErrors.CLASSIFIER_DUPLICATE: A classifier with this code already exists.
apiErrors.ADMIN_CANNOT_DEACTIVATE_SELF: You cannot deactivate your own administrator account. Ask another administrator to deactivate your account.
apiErrors.LAST_ACTIVE_ADMIN_REQUIRED: At least one active administrator must remain. Add another active administrator before deactivating this account.
apiErrors.ADMIN_CANNOT_DELETE_SELF: You cannot delete your own administrator account. Ask another administrator to delete your account.
apiErrors.ADMIN_GROUP_ACCESS_PROTECTED: The administrator group (ADMIN) cannot have data access removed.
apiErrors.NO_ACTIVE_LLM_API: No active API key found for this model.
apiErrors.LLM_ACTIVATE_REQUIRES_API: This model has no API credentials yet. Add at least one active API key before activating it.
apiErrors.ADMIN_CREDENTIAL_REPLACE_CONFIRMATION_RE: Confirm replacing the current admin connection credential.
apiErrors.DATABASE_CREDENTIAL_USERNAME_DUPLICATE: A connection username with this name already exists for this database.
apiErrors.NO_DATABASES_ACCESSIBLE: No databases are accessible for this user.
apiErrors.LLM_NOT_FOUND_OR_INACTIVE: Language model not found or inactive.
apiErrors.UNSUPPORTED_LLM_PROVIDER: The model provider is not supported.
apiErrors.INVALID_MODEL_NAME: Model name must be a valid API identifier (e.g. "claude-sonnet-4-5", "gpt-4o", "gemini-2.5-flash").
apiErrors.DATABASE_POOL_CONNECT_FAILED: Failed to connect to one or more databases.
apiErrors.LLM_PRICE_DUPLICATE: This pricing row already exists for the selected modality/token type/sizing and validity window.
apiErrors.USER_EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS: A user with this email already exists.
